parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam maxMessageSize 150
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left

title HashedTimelockERC20 contract: normal flow - receiver withdraws with preimage before the timelock expires

box "Ethereum Network" #B0C4DE
participant Sender <<Account>>
participant Receiver <<Account>>
participant HashedTimelockERC20 <<Smart Contract>>
participant ERC20Contract <<Smart Contract>>
participant Events
end box

note over HashedTimelockERC20
State stored for each HTLC:
  address sender;
  address receiver;
  address tokenContract;
  uint amount;
  bytes32 hashlock;
  uint timelock; // UNIX ts
  bool withdrawn;
  bool refunded;
  bytes32 preimage;
end note

Sender -> ERC20Contract: approve(htlc address, amount)
activate ERC20Contract
ERC20Contract -> Sender
deactivate ERC20Contract

Sender -> HashedTimelockERC20: newContract(\n  receiver,\n  hashlock,\n  timelock,\n  tokenContract,\n  amount\n)
activate HashedTimelockERC20
HashedTimelockERC20 -> ERC20Contract: transferFrom(sender, htlc address, amount)
activate ERC20Contract
ERC20Contract -> HashedTimelockERC20
deactivate ERC20Contract
HashedTimelockERC20 -> Events: LogHTLCERC20New(contractId, locks, values, etc.)
HashedTimelockERC20 -> Sender: contractId
deactivate HashedTimelockERC20

Sender -> Receiver: reveals contractId

Receiver -> Receiver: knows/obtains secret preimage\n[sha256(secret preimage) == hashlock]

Receiver -> HashedTimelockERC20: withdraw(contractId, secret preimage)
activate HashedTimelockERC20
HashedTimelockERC20 -> ERC20Contract: transfer(receiver, amount)
activate ERC20Contract
ERC20Contract -> HashedTimelockERC20
deactivate ERC20Contract
HashedTimelockERC20 -> Events: LogHTLCERC20Withdraw(contractId)
deactivate HashedTimelockERC20

@enduml
```
